meta.name: Mortgage Payment & Affordability Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade mortgage calculator compliant with ISO 9001:2015, Lean Six Sigma DMAIC, and WERC financial metrics. Calculates monthly payment, total interest, amortization schedule, and affordability risk.

inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.

inputs.label: Down Payment Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.

inputs.label: Property Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.

inputs.label: Home Insurance Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.

inputs.label: Monthly HOA Fee
inputs.businessContext: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

inputs.label: Annual Gross Income
inputs.businessContext: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.

inputs.label: Monthly Existing Debt Payments
inputs.businessContext: Recurring monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, credit cards).

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, credit cards).

inputs.label: Payment Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often payments are made. Accelerated biweekly results in 13 full payments per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: How often payments are made. Accelerated biweekly results in 13 full payments per year.

rules.message: Down payment below 20% triggers PMI (Private Mortgage Insurance).
Debt-to-Income ratio exceeds 43% threshold. Loan may be high risk.
Loan-to-Value ratio exceeds 97%. Maximum allowed for FHA.

thresholds.message: Housing payment exceeds 28% of gross monthly income. Consider reducing loan amount.
Total interest paid over life of loan exceeds 50% of principal. Consider shorter term or lower rate.

formulas.label: Property Value
formulas.description: Derived from loan amount and down payment percentage.

formulas.label: Monthly Interest Rate
formulas.description: Annual rate converted to monthly compounding.

formulas.label: Number of Payments
formulas.description: Total payments over loan term adjusted for frequency.

formulas.label: Monthly Taxes & Insurance
formulas.description: Annual property tax and insurance divided by 12.

formulas.label: Total Monthly Payment
formulas.description: Full monthly housing cost including P&I, taxes, insurance, HOA.

formulas.label: Total Interest Paid
formulas.description: Sum of all interest payments over full loan term.

primary.label: Total Monthly Payment
primary.description: Primary result: total monthly mortgage payment.

debt_to_income_ratio.label: Debt-to-Income Ratio
debt_to_income_ratio.description: Total monthly debt (including mortgage) divided by gross monthly income.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Private Mortgage Insurance (PMI)
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If down payment < 20%, PMI adds 0.5-1% of loan amount annually.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Opportunity Cost of Down Payment
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Capital tied up in down payment could have earned 5-8% in market.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inflation Erosion of Fixed Payment
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Real value of fixed payment decreases over time; impacts long-term affordability.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Down Payment to 20%
suggestedActions.description: Eliminates PMI and reduces monthly payment by ~$150-300.

suggestedActions.label: Consider 15-Year Term
suggestedActions.description: Higher monthly payment but saves 60%+ in total interest.

suggestedActions.label: Shop for Lower Interest Rate
suggestedActions.description: Reducing rate by 0.5% saves ~$100/month on $300k loan.

suggestedActions.label: Pay Down Existing Debt
suggestedActions.description: Lowers DTI ratio, improves loan approval odds and rate.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Adjusted confidence based on input variability and market volatility. Scale 0-1.
